fields.label: Blog Widgets
fields.name: blog_widgets
fields.instructions: These appear on the blog posts right sidebar area as widgets.

sub_fields.label: Enable Go-Green
sub_fields.name: enable_go-green
sub_fields.instructions: This will show a "Go-Green" checkbox on checkout below Order Notes.

fields.label: Email Signup Modal
fields.name: email_signup_modal
fields.instructions: This email signup modal is shown to new visitors on home page, blog, or single posts or product.

sub_fields.label: Enable Email Signup Modal
sub_fields.name: enable
sub_fields.instructions: Enable this popup to appear after 25 seconds or if the visitor mouse leaves the browser.

fields.label: Restrict VIP Category Products to only Active Subscribers
fields.name: restrict_vip_product_category_products_active_subscribers
fields.instructions: Restrict Valentines Category products so that only a logged customer that has an active subscription can purchase.

fields.label: Show Banner
fields.name: show_banner
fields.instructions: Whether to show or hide Archive products banner.

fields.label: CBD Products
fields.name: cbd_products
fields.instructions: Choose which products are CBD products. CBD products have special notices and restrictions.

fields.label: CBD Availability Notice
fields.name: cbd_availability_notice
fields.default_value: .This product is only available for U.S., U.K. and Canada.

fields.label: Sold Out Product Waitlist
fields.name: sold_out_product_waitlist
fields.instructions: MailChimp sold out product waitlist form settings.

fields.label: Limit Product To One Cart Quantity
fields.name: limit_product_to_one_cart_quantity

fields.label: Sitewide Discount
fields.name: sitewide_discount
fields.instructions: Discount applied at cart and checkout level. (Uses Woo Fee API)

sub_fields.label: Excluded Product IDs
sub_fields.name: excluded_product_ids
sub_fields.instructions: Separate product ids by commas, ex: ","

sub_fields.label: Enable
sub_fields.name: enable
sub_fields.instructions: This will enable a Sale Popup Modal to appear on all pages beside home, products and single product, because this will funnel traffic from other interior pages to product pages.

fields.label: Active Subscriber Discounts
fields.name: active_subscriber_discounts
fields.instructions: Whether to show or hide Archive products banner.

sub_fields.label: Serums 20% OFF Discount
sub_fields.name: serums_discount
sub_fields.instructions: If a logged in customer has an active subscription and Serums product in cart, then they get 20% off cart total

sub_fields.label: Sale Category 20% OFF Discount
sub_fields.name: sale_category_discount
sub_fields.instructions: If a logged in customer has an active subscription and Product Category Sale product in cart, then they get 20% off cart total

sub_fields.label: Specific Products Discount
sub_fields.name: specific_products_discount
sub_fields.instructions: If a logged in customer has an active subscription and Specific products in cart, then they get a Cart discount

sub_fields.label: FREE Shipping
sub_fields.name: free_shipping
sub_fields.instructions: If a logged in customer has an active subscription then they get FREE shipping

sub_fields.label: Message
sub_fields.message: If Cart amount is >= $75, then discount the travel kit down to $75

fields.label: Allowed New Customer Only Coupons
fields.name: allowed_new_customer_only_coupons
fields.instructions: Coupon will be removed from cart for customers that have already previously purchased.

sub_fields.label: Threshold Order Subtotal
sub_fields.name: threshold_order_subtotal
sub_fields.instructions: If the order subtotal is greater than X then grant them the gift.

sub_fields.label: Order Note
sub_fields.name: order_note
sub_fields.instructions: Add a order note to the order when they achieve the threshold

fields.label: Message
fields.message: These settings are used for WooCommerce Emails

fields.label: Enable My Coupons
fields.name: enable_my_coupons
fields.instructions: This will add a 'My Coupons' tab to the WooCommerce Account area. Make sure to re-save permalinks (under settings) after changing this option.

fields.label: Subscription Enable Change Next Order Date
fields.name: subscription_enable_change_next_order_date

fields.label: Subscription Reason For Cancellation Text
fields.name: subscription_reason_for_cancellation_text
fields.default_value: We're sad to hear you want to cancel your subscription but we understand. Please tell us your reason for cancellation, this will help us improve!

fields.label: Subscription Reason For Cancellation Ninja Form ID
fields.name: subscription_reason_for_cancellation_ninja_form_id

fields.label: Subscription Cancellation Warning Text
fields.name: subscription_cancellation_warning_text
fields.default_value:
We're sad to hear you want to cancel your subscription but we understand. Cancelling means this subscription will be inactive will not ever able to be reactivated. You will lose any pricing discounts you have. Of course you can also start a new subscription anytime you'd like it just might not have the same pricing benefits. Shop all products here.

Once your subscription is fully cancelled it will be impossible to reactivate. Please confirm you are sure you want to cancel.

fields.label: Subscription Global Skipped Products
fields.name: subscription_global_skipped_products
fields.instructions: Separate Product IDs by comma. These products will be skipped from Subscription renewals.

fields.label: Payment Methods Enable Delete All Payment Methods
fields.name: payment_methods_enable_delete_all_payment_methods

fields.label: Hide shipping rates when free shipping is available
fields.name: hide_shipping_rates_when_free_shipping_is_available

fields.label: New Order Message Text
fields.name: new_order_message_text
fields.instructions:
Trigger: On Checkout - Order Status Processing
Tags: {order_id}, {customer_first_name}, {customer_last_name}

fields.label: Shipment Message Text
fields.name: shipment_message_text
fields.instructions:
Trigger: On Received Tracking Code from BC Fulfillment
Tags: {order_id}, {ship_at}, {shipping_provider}, {tracking_number}, {customer_first_name}, {customer_last_name}

fields.label: Analyze and Glow Quiz List Id
fields.name: analyze_and_glow_quiz_klaviyo_list_id
